notes: Input reliability: text no longer vanishes while you scroll or after switching chats, the send button no longer gets stuck disabled, and your draft (text + attachments) stays with its chat. Analyzing documents no longer yanks you into a new chat while you're working elsewhere — it opens quietly in the background (only in front when you're on Home). Fixed the 'Identifying next steps for …' link on Home opening the wrong family member's chat — it now opens the person named in the status.
